live_browser_title_before: Step Into Dracula | The Earnalism Digital Library
source_headline_after: A calm digital reading room for timeless Bengali and English literature.
source_browser_title_after: Earnalism | Bengali and English Classics in a Calm Digital Library

source_hero_structure_after: Hybrid editorial hero with neutral library positioning and three curated action cards.

action_cards.name: English Classics
action_cards.positioning: Dracula as one refined reading tile

correction_plan_completed: Removed Dracula-first homepage headline and static SEO fallback from source.
Replaced homepage hero with neutral Bengali + English editorial positioning.
Reframed Dracula as a single English Classics action card.
Added Bengali Classics action card with reader-only/live copy.
Kept audiobook card gated with no default A Ghost Story probe or CTA.
Removed Dracula hardcopy preload from the public shell.
Validated invalid same-origin API payloads fail closed on book detail pages.
preview_blocker_or_next_action: Deploy/push this source patch to a preview and run visual smoke with VERCEL_AUTOMATION_BYPASS_SECRET if Deployment Protection is enabled.
release_gate_truth: PASS; no unapproved audio controls or audiobook claims were introduced.
